details.attacks: 1 x attack (1d8+4 by fist or weapon)
details.special: PSI: WT: Detect Life, Know Direction Powers: 3 Psionic Resistance: Only affected by 2nd rank Powers and onwards. Throw Hurl Rocks: When in combat, they can throw rocks that deal 2d10+5 damage, They can do so three times per day. Boulder throwing: Up to 200’ Fortress: On desert islands. system.description:
The Giants of Athas are huge, lumbering creatures who commonly inhabit the islands of the Sea of Silt.
